titleStmt.title: SII 30.164: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 164. (A.R. No. 243 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the south wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 5, day 230: 1017 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged at the end. Begins with the praśasti of the king, tirumaṉṉi vaḷara. The inscription records a gift of 90 sheep for a perpetual lamp to the temple of Sri Pōndai Mahādēva in Parākramasōḷa-chaturvedimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Karaikkōḍu a part of Tiruvēgambapuram of Dāmark-kōṭṭam, a sub division in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam by Mandarakōvanār Kundādēviyār, queen of Vallavaraiyar Vandiyadēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumanni
vaḷara Iru nilamaṭa[ntai
yum porcceyappā
v]aiyum cirttaṉicce
lviyum tanperun
teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa ne
ṭutiyulūḻiyuḷiṭaitu
ṟai nāṭun tuṭarvaṉavelippa
ṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻma
tiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇa
ṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakka
mum porukaṭaliḻattaracar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal tennavar vaitta cuntara muṭiyu mintiranāramu
teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāṉa
śrī rājentracoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu 2 10000 3 1000
jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmark ko
ṭṭattu tiruvekampapurattu
karaikkoṭṭu brahmateyamāna parākkira
macoḻa caturvvetimaṅkalattu śrīpontai mahāde
varkku Uṭaiyār vallavar[ Aiyar vandya] devar
mantara kovanār kun=tādeviyārRead- kuntavaiteviyār ci Aṭikaḷ
kañciya Appaiyaraciyā pati mai Aṭṭuva
cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇū
ṟum can=tirātittavaṟ Oru tirunu
nta viḷakku Erikkiṉṟa Uḻa
kkāl nicata Uḻakku ney Aṭ
ṭi muṭṭāme Erikka
Ivvāṭume
Digital edition of SII 30.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
